raw.excerpt: Tournoi Sur demande chaque samedi

One Piece locals!
Iedereen welkom, zelfs boven capacity
entree is 6€ iedereen ontvangt guaranteed 1 booster packs bovenop Participation promo's

Bring your own deck, compete and have fun.

***Prizes***
1st : 5 boosters
2nd: 4 boosters
3th: 3 boosters
everyone else: 2 Boosters

raw.event_series_title: ONE PIECE CARD GAME Pirates Party 2026 Vol.1

raw.excerpt:
Avis à tous les équipages ! Les tournois hebdomadaires battent leur plein chez MagicFranco. C'est le moment idéal pour tester votre deck, grimper dans le classement et repartir avec des récompenses exclusives à l'effigie de vos héros préférés !

Les modalités du tournoi : PAF : 10€  Format : Construit (Rondes suisses – Matchs en BO1 de 30 min + 5 min).

BUTIN POUR TOUS : Chaque participant reçoit 1 booster One Piece + 1 booster Promo pour sa participation !

RÉCOMPENSES DE CLASSEMENT : Le vainqueur repart avec un Booster Promo WINNER exclusif ! Des boosters supplémentaires seront distribués selon le classement final et le nombre de participants.

HORAIRE : Début des duels à 11h00.  ADRESSE : 11 Chaussée de Jolimont, 7100 La Louvière.
INSCRIPTIONS : Pensez à vous enregistrer via l'application TGC+ !

Shop en ligne : https://shop.magicfranco.be/

Que la volonté du D soit avec vous chez MagicFranco !

events.title: ONE PIECE CARD GAME Extra Grand Battle for Stores 2026 May​

raw.excerpt:
Join us for the first Extra Grand Battle at Outpost Antwerp.
Bring a deck you believe is most likely to survive the Buster Call, and take home exclusive prize cards!
2 boosters in the prize pool per player, all players are guaranteed 1 booster prize
raw.event_series_title: ONE PIECE CARD GAME Extra Grand Battle for Stores 2026 May​

raw.excerpt: This event will start at 18:30 instead of 14:00. For an accurate planning check the discord: https://discord.gg/4MmPddRV8u

events.title: ONE PIECE CARD GAME Pirates Party 2026 Vol.1

raw.excerpt:
Set Sail! The Pirate Party 2026 Vol.1 is coming to Outpost!
From Monday 5 May until Monday 22 June, our weekly locals will double as Pirate Party events — so every week is a chance to earn exclusive Pirate Party rewards just by showing up and playing.

Participation:
1x Welcome Pack 2026 Vol.1
1x promo P-119 Portgas.D.Ace

events.title: ONE PIECE CARD GAME Pirates Party 2026 Vol.1

raw.event_series_title: ONE PIECE CARD GAME Pirates Party 2026 Vol.1

raw.excerpt: If the event is full we will give priority to our local players first. Wednesdays will cost €10 and there will be extra boosters in tr prise pool. Fridays will be €7 and we only play for a winner card. On fridays Block 1 is allowed.

2 booster packs per player are added to the prize pool. Each player will receive at least 1 pack. Starting from the middle of the standings, players will receive 2 packs, increasing toward the top placements.

Top players will also receive a winner pack (depending on attendance), and an additional raffle for tournament prizes will be held.

By participating in these Store Tournaments, you will also earn points for the League. Prizes will be awarded at the end of the season (next OP set release).

HORAIRE : Début des duels à 11h00. ADRESSE : 11 Chaussée de Jolimont, 7100 La Louvière. 
INSCRIPTIONS : Pensez à vous enregistrer via l'application TGC+ !

Shop en ligne : https://shop.magicfranco.be/

Que la volonté du D soit avec vous chez MagicFranco !

raw.excerpt: If the event is full we will give priority to our local players first. Wednesdays will cost €10 and there will be extra boosters in tr prise pool. Fridays will be €7 and we only play for a winner card. On fridays Block 1 is allowed.

2 booster packs per player are added to the prize pool. Each player will receive at least 1 pack. Starting from the middle of the standings, players will receive 2 packs, increasing toward the top placements.

Top players will also receive a winner pack (depending on attendance), and an additional raffle for tournament prizes will be held.

By participating in these Store Tournaments, you will also earn points for the League. Prizes will be awarded at the end of the season (next OP set release).
